text:
(Photo by Richard Pelham/Getty Images)

A female boxer seemed forced to withdraw from a fight against a man parading as a woman Thursday at the 2024 Summer Olympics.

For some reason, someone at the Olympics thought it was acceptable to let amanwho wants everyone to call him a girl jump into the boxing ring with an actual female athlete. The man, Imane Khelif, is an Algerian athlete who failed eligibility tests to take part in the 2023 World Championships (WC) because he is literally aman, asnotedby the New York Post.

But apparently the Olympic organizers don’t care about gender equality, so they let Khelif beat the crap out of Italian boxer Angela Carini on Thursday, as seen infootageshared on social media. Carini seemed forced to withdraw from the match in just 46 seconds, just like all other women would have had to because we’re not physically capable of competing against biological males at this level.

Angela Carini (blue, female) abandons fight against Imane Khelif (red, male) a few minutes into fight /1pic.twitter.com/yOIvZkDaow

— FairPlayForWomen (@fairplaywomen)August 1, 2024



Satire is now realitypic.twitter.com/c4wmshSzwX

— End Wokeness (@EndWokeness)August 1, 2024



It must be sad for Khelif knowing that he will be remembered as amanwho beats upwomenfor sport. He’ll never be remembered as an actual athlete, just a weird person who hurt another when he got the opportunity.

As for Carini, I hope she knows that earning a medal for the Olympics doesn’t really mean anything anymore, thanks to whoever put together this Paris catastrophe. No one will think ill or less of her. In fact, she’s probably cemented her place in history for her prowess in agreeing to try and fight adudein the first place.(RELATED: Olympics Opening Ceremony Goes Viral Because Everyone Is Like ‘WTF Even Is This?’)

She apparently yelled “this is unjust” at her corner before calling off the fight, according to the Post. “I got into the ring to fight. But I didn’t feel like it anymore after the first minute. I started to feel a strong pain in my nose. I didn’t give up, but a punch hurt too much and so I said enough. I’m leaving with my head held high,” she reportedly said following the ordeal.

PARIS, FRANCE – AUGUST 01: Angela Carini of Team Italy reacts after abandoning her Women’s 66kg preliminary round match against Imane Khelif of Team Algeria in the first round on day six of the Olympic Games Paris 2024 at North Paris Arena on August 01, 2024 in Paris, France. (Photo by Richard Pelham/Getty Images)

PARIS, FRANCE – AUGUST 01: Imane Khelif of Team Algeria looks on after Angela Carini of Team Italy abandons the Women’s 66kg preliminary round match in the first round on day six of the Olympic Games Paris 2024 at North Paris Arena on August 01, 2024 in Paris, France. (Photo by Richard Pelham/Getty Images)

PARIS, FRANCE – AUGUST 01: Angela Carini of Team Italy makes her way to the ring prior to the Women’s 66kg preliminary round match against Imane Khelif of Team Algeria on day six of the Olympic Games Paris 2024 at North Paris Arena on August 01, 2024 in Paris, France. (Photo by Richard Pelham/Getty Images)

PARIS, FRANCE – AUGUST 01: Team Algeria Coach Pedro Diaz splashes water on the face of Imane Khelif of Team Algeria prior to the Women’s 66kg preliminary round match against Angela Carini of Team Italy on day six of the Olympic Games Paris 2024 at North Paris Arena on August 01, 2024 in Paris, France. (Photo by Richard Pelham/Getty Images)

The 2024 Paris Olympics will likely go down in history as the stupidest and most dangerous in modern times. Not only have the organizers completely destroyed the games for the actual, biological, scientifically accurate female gender but they also put the lives of every single top-ranking triathlete in the world ismortaldanger by forcing them to swim in thefilthy watersof the Seine.

Either the Olympic organizers are doing this on purpose because they think it’s what the spectators want — they would be wrong — or they’re doing this to further instigate the ideological civil war taking place within our species, where idiots like them take power over common sense folks like you, dear reader.(RELATED: ‘Malicious Acts’ Wreak Havoc At Olympics)

No matter the motivation, one thing is certain: someone suffering extreme stupidity just destroyed thousands of years of the Olympic Games.

TRENDING

title:
‘This Is Unjust!’: Female Olympian Withdraws 46 Seconds Into Forced Fight Against Man | 
		The Daily Caller
